system.description: A god beyond our imaginations, wrapping their cold tentacles around existence. Its believers tend to end up dead. Be careful.
system.title: God of the Abyss

scriptures.name: Level 1: Sacrificial Knife
scriptures.description: Summon an unholy blade of eldritch design. To use, inflict a Wound on yourself and gain a number of Advantages equal to your level in the god on your attack.

specials.name: If kills living target, remove 1 debt

scriptures.name: Level 2: Frenzy of the Abyss-Touched
scriptures.description: Begin chanting an awful liturgy. Everyone that joins in gets: Advantage on all attacks, temporary Health equal to their Con, lose all Guard.

scriptures.name: Level 3: Summon Abomination
scriptures.description: With a fresh corpse killed with the Sacrificial Knife, summon an abomination until dawn. For every success, describe an aspect and its capabilities. It has Str 4, Con 4 and Health 4.
